content:
1. Generates monthly article summaries (with author names) for a given year/month, with optional category filtering; returns a Report object. Exists as a quick demo that hit N+1 scaling problems.

2. N+1 query in the author loop; December end-date logic; in-memory category filter; assumptions about db interface and article/author dict shapes.

3. Batch-fetching authors vs. pushing category filter into SQL (see "Open" comment).

4. Invalid month/year, missing authors, DB errors/timeouts, timezone-naive datetimes, duplicate or zero-word articles, large result sets.
